title: Loving John.
content:
John went into the garden one day
        And found his baby sister at play;

     John hit baby with a brick
        And laughed because it made her sick.

     John is only two and six
        And loves to do these funny tricks.
meaning:
Edwin C. Ranck's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Loving John."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
